name: Caramel Popcorn
recipeInstructions: Combine the brown sugar, dark corn syrup, and butter in a saucepan. Bring to a boil and cook for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and add vanilla, cream of tartar, salt, and baking soda. Stir until it turns lighter in color and increases in volume. Pour the mixture over the popped popcorn and toss to mix evenly. Place in a roasting pan. Bake at 200 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, stirring every 20 minutes or so. Pour onto wax paper and allow to cool before separating. Makes 8 quarts.
